verdict_detail: Refuse the bundled execution. Constrain disaggregated components: in-scope interventions execute under existing delegation; extended-scope require explicit consent; out-of-scope refused pending separate authorization process. Mandate documentation of all scope-boundary decisions.
confidence: High on refusal of bundle-as-structured; medium-high on scope-boundary documentation mandate; medium on classification of borderline interventions.
unresolved_uncertainty_sources: Whether scope-of-authority will be honored under operational-cycle execution pressure.
Whether retroactive rationalization can be prevented by upstream documentation.
Whether ecosystem-scale effects of repeated execution will be captured by current review processes.
